description: A Class D conduct artifact whose commit_chain contains a stage with a hash but no preimage content MUST receive CONDUCT_INVALID. A hash without its preimage is unauditable (CC1).

input.claim: the recommended strategy is to ship F-1 as a class-scoped governance correction

not_optimizing_for: preservation of existing WISEATA wire format

reasoning_trace.claim: single-rule lock at genesis is upstream of all later compromises

challenge_surface.argument: thin Class A adoption is a real risk

failure_signals: no Class A implementations achieve conformance

not_optimizing_for: preservation of existing WISEATA wire format

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant CC1: a hash without its preimage MUST be treated as unauditable. Stage 2 declares a hash but content is null — preimage is missing. Per D5 (Class D commit stages MUST include preimage content) and CC3 (missing commit stages MUST invalidate process proof), the artifact MUST receive CONDUCT_INVALID. Exercises CC1, CC3, D5.
